title: iria thermalis
intro: Iria thermalis is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. Iria thermalis is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's extracts have been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Iria thermalis can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties and health benefits.
